description: CSS positioning: relative, absolute, z-index stacking, float left/right, clear, overflow hidden
visual_assertions: The relative-positioned box should be offset 20px from top and 30px from left within its container
The absolute-positioned boxes should appear in the four corners of their yellow container
The z-index stacking section should show green (z:3) on top of blue (z:2) on top of red (z:1)
The float-left box should appear on the left side with text wrapping to its right
The float-right box should appear on the right side with text flowing to its left
The cleared element should appear below the floated element, not beside it
The overflow:hidden box should clip content that extends beyond its 200x80px boundary
